rules.explanation_for_clinician: In cardiac illness, QT-prolonging psychotropics need a baseline ECG/QTc, electrolyte correction, and cardiology input where appropriate.
missing_investigations: Baseline ECG/QTc; correct electrolytes before a QT-prolonging agent.
monitoring_required: ECG/QTc monitoring with QT-prolonging agents in cardiac illness.

rules.explanation_for_clinician: Lithium is renally cleared with a narrow therapeutic index; in renal impairment prefer specialist input and a renally safer alternative, with close level and renal-function monitoring.
missing_investigations: Renal function/eGFR before and during lithium.
monitoring_required: More frequent lithium levels and renal-function checks in renal impairment.

rules.explanation_for_clinician: Valproate is hepatotoxic; avoid or use only with specialist review and close LFT monitoring in hepatic impairment.
monitoring_required: Liver function monitoring before and during valproate.
